title: MutantsResult
description: Output of `vow-mutants run` and `vow-mutants list`. JSON Lines format: one record per line, followed by a final Summary line.

file.description: Path of the source file relative to the project root.

off.description: Byte offset of the mutation site.

len.description: Byte length of the mutation span.

from.description: Original source text at the site (empty for body-replace).

to.description: Replacement text spliced in for this mutation.

clause_index.description: Disambiguates sibling contract clauses on the same function. 0 for non-contract sites.

tier.description: Oracle tier that produced the verdict. Present only in `run` output.

oracle_ms.description: Per-mutant oracle wall-clock in milliseconds. Non-deterministic — excluded from the determinism guarantee. Present only in `run` output.

total.description: Number of records emitted in this shard before the summary line.

unrun.description: Tier-1 survivors not run because the Tier-2 budget was exhausted.
